+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Bob Dylan - Patti Smith Tour of Australia and New Zealand 

Darwin Amphitheatre, Darwin, Northern Territory, Australia, August 28, 1998:

Dylan Set
CDR > EAC > Flac (Taper unknown)

Disk 1
01 Maggie's Farm 
02 License To Kill 
03 Can't Wait 
04 It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry 
05 Under The Red Sky 
06 Silvio 
07 Stone Walls And Steel Bars (acoustic w band) 
08 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band) 
09 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic w band) 

Disk 2
01 Knockin' On Heaven's Door (acoustic w band) 
02 This Wheel's On Fire 
03 'Til I Fell In Love With You 
04 Love Sick 
05 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic w band)
06 Highway 61 Revisited 
07 Forever Young
